description: A 3D printing technician needs a hollowed-out 'shell' model of the skull from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan to save resin. Create a 3D surface of a hollowed skull shell. Export the model to /home/ga/Documents/hollow_skull.stl and save the project, including the bone, core, and hollow shell masks, to /home/ga/Documents/hollow_project.inv3.
